series.name: Commercial crude oil stocks excluding SPR

This exact commercial crude-stock series is published for Cushing, PADDs, and the United States, not PADD subdistricts.

caveats: Commercial crude stocks exclude the Strategic Petroleum Reserve. Cushing is a source-published local storage-hub observation nested under PADD 2, not a state total.
Only mutually exclusive PADD rows may be combined; never add Cushing to PADD 2 because it is already contained within that district.
